evaluations.prompt: Add a link to the 'Architecture Overview' note.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent produces [[Architecture Overview]] not [Architecture Overview](path/to/file.md). Standard markdown links are rejected for intra-vault linking.

evaluations.prompt: Embed the diagram from 'Diagrams/System.md' into a new note.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent uses ![[Diagrams/System.md]] (with leading !) not [[Diagrams/System.md]]. The parser categorizes embeds separately from semantic links.

evaluations.prompt: Extract all links from this markdown file using a regex.
evaluations.expected_behavior: Agent refuses to write ad-hoc regex. It runs parser.py analyze --file <path> to extract links deterministically.
